chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Date Order with signature of the Judge Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro. Mr. Justice Muhammad Abdul Rehman. C.P.No.D-1303 of 2022 M/s Modern Shipping Agencies (Pvt) Ltd.............. Petitioner Vs. Karachi Port Trust & others............... Respondents. 07.08.2025. Mr. Abdul Qadir Syed, advocate for Petitioner. Ms. Shazia Hanjra, DAG. O R D E R = MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Petitioner, a private limited company, was allotted a plot measuring 4000 Sq. mts. at TPX area by Karachi Port Trust (KPT) on temporary basis for handling of empty containers, is aggrieved by a notice dated 02.02.2022 cancelling allotment by KPT. 2. Learned counsel for petitioner during arguments has informed that in fact after filing of this petition, allotment of subject plot has been extended from time to time and currently for three months from July to September, 2025 and in the light of terms and conditions of such extension, the petitioner has already paid advance rent of the said three months till September, 2025. 3. We, therefore, are of the view that since the notice for cancellation of allotment has been impliedly recalled by KPT by extending the allotment period till September, 2025, this petition has virtually become infructuous. Notwithstanding, we observe that petitioner shall not be evicted from the premises on expiry of such period otherwise than due to course of law. Learned counsel for petitioner is satisfied. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of alongwith pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE
